sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this Technical File assembles the documentation required by EU MDR 2017/745 Annexes II and III for {device_name_model}, and serves as the foundation for FDA submissions and other market dossiers per strategy {ref:RA-001}.

sections.title: 2. EU MDR Annex II Index
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate index rows for EU MDR Annex II sections 1–6: 1. Device description and specification incl variants/accessories; 2. Information to be supplied by the manufacturer (labels, IFU); 3. Design and manufacturing information; 4. General Safety and Performance Requirements (GSPR) checklist; 5. Benefit-risk analysis and risk management ({ref:RD-007}); 6. Product verification and validation ({ref:RD-005}, {ref:RD-006}), clinical evaluation, PMS plan ({ref:RA-005}), PSUR ({ref:RA-006}). Status one of Complete|In progress|Not started. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 3. EU MDR Annex III — PMS Documentation
sections.section_prompt: Summarise that Annex III content (PMS plan, PSUR, PMCF plan and report, trend reports) is maintained in {ref:RA-005} and {ref:RA-006}, kept current throughout the product lifecycle.

sections.title: 4. GSPR Checklist (Annex I)
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate 14–18 representative GSPR entries from EU MDR Annex I (Chapters I General, II Design & Manufacture, III Information). Apply Y/N/NA with rationale in evidence column citing internal docs ({ref:RD-002}, {ref:RD-005}, {ref:RD-007}, {ref:MF-001}, {ref:SW-009}). Standard cites e.g. ISO 14971, IEC 60601-1, IEC 62366-1, IEC 62304, ISO 10993-1, ISO 11607. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 5. FDA 510(k) / De Novo Cross-Mapping
sections.section_prompt: Describe how this technical file maps to FDA submission sections (eSTAR / 510(k) format): device description, substantial equivalence, performance testing, biocompatibility, software, cybersecurity, labelling. Reference document codes used.

output_config.footer: CONFIDENTIAL — Controlled Document | EU MDR Annex II/III
